description: CodeX worktree hygiene policy for autonomous Trello MCP and room-control work. Content scans protect values, not labels.

path_rules.reason: tree steward policy/schema controls autonomous preflight behavior
path_rules.recommendation: run tree steward doctor and focused preflight checks before commit
review for broad ignore rules before commit
verify the agent card is scoped and non-destructive

path_rules.reason: large/local private-mail-adjacent project outside Trello MCP work
path_rules.recommendation: keep ignored or adopt as a separate project; do not mix into Trello MCP commits
run a focused syntax or smoke test before commit
run MCP status and focused smoke tests before commit
do not rewire Candice/Kandice unless Stephen explicitly asks
stage only if it matches the active Trello MCP slice
review generated index churn before commit
review content before deciding whether it belongs in the repo

content_checks.name: stale_redacted_code_path
content_checks.message: Stale redacted CodeX path in a live repo file

content_checks.name: stale_redacted_pi_path
content_checks.message: Stale redacted Pi/Candice path in a live repo file

content_checks.name: private_key_material
content_checks.message: Private key material appears in a tracked text file

content_checks.name: raw_secret_assignment
content_checks.message: Possible raw secret value assignment; inspect without printing values

content_checks.name: sensitive_label_only
content_checks.message: Sensitive label or policy term only; not a blocking value finding

trello_mcp_preflight.description: Required before Trello MCP build or apply-like slices.
